zh.Goettingen, Hannover, Prussia: 德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen於1385年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根時，她的父親Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen45歲，母親Margarete von Berg22歲。她於從1405年7月10日到1405年8月9日與Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆武斯拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen于1385年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根时，她的父亲Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen45岁，母亲Margarete von Berg22岁。她于从1405年7月10日到1405年8月9日与Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆武斯拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen was born in 1385, in Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, her father, Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen, was 45 and her mother, Margarete von Berg, was 22. She married Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen from 10 July 1405 to 9 August 1405, in Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1444, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Uslar, Northeim, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen est née en 1385, à Göttingen, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margarete von Berg, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen du 10 juillet 1405 au 9 août 1405, à Göttingen, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1444, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Uslar, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen 1385 in Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen 45 und ihre Mutter Margarete von Berg 22. Sie hat von 10. Juli 1405 bis 9. August 1405 in Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1444 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Uslar, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen è nata il nel 1385 nel Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Margarete von Berg, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen da 10 luglio 1405 a 9 agosto 1405, nel Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1444, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Uslar, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingenが1385年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーグoッティンジェンで生まれた時，父Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingenは45歳，母Margarete von Bergは22歳であった。から1405年7月10日まで1405年8月9日にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーグoッティンジェンでErich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1444年に故郷で59歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ノースエイムウスラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen(이)가 1385년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 그o틴겐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete von Berg(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1405년 7월 10일부터 1405년 8월 9일까지 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 그o틴겐에서 Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 노르테임 슬라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen nasceu em 1385, em Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margarete von Berg, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen de 10 de julho de 1405 a 9 de agosto de 1405, em Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1444, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Uslar, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen родилась в 1385 г. в местности гoттинген, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarete von Berg, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen с 10 июля 1405 по 9 августа 1405 в местности гoттинген, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1444 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности услар, ландкрис нортим, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Göttingen nació en 1385, en Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margarete von Berg, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Erich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen desde 10 de julio de 1405 hasta 9 de agosto de 1405, en Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1444, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Uslar, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
